author: PMO Director
body: Do not close this warning until supplier-backed delivery dates and allocation impacts are verified.

author: Buildings Sector Director
body: Consolidate all design interfaces in one matrix and assign a response owner to each item.

author: Design Manager
body: Zone-based release is acceptable only with a signed builder-work checklist.

author: Tunnels Sector Director
body: Recovery baseline must include factory inspection gates and objective evidence.

author: Infrastructure Director
body: Quantify the programme and cost effect of the shorter possession before approval.

author: PMO Controls Lead
body: One missing update has been received; keep the remaining item escalated until validated.

author: Portfolio Controls Manager
body: Include delivery quantities by diameter and the activity demand date.

author: B02 Project Manager
body: The interface matrix is complete except for two consultant responses.

author: B04 Project Manager
body: Zone 1 can proceed; Zone 2 remains held pending electrical confirmation.

author: QA/QC Director
body: Escalate immediately if the approval is not received before the batching reservation expires.

author: PMO Director
body: Vendor evidence should be uploaded weekly and reviewed against the baseline.

author: PMO Director
body: Apply the reporting cut-off consistently and record exceptions in the audit trail.

author: Planning Manager
body: Use the latest demand-loaded steel forecast during the recovery workshop.

author: MEP Manager
body: Bring the coordinated opening register and signed discipline comments.

author: PMO Systems Analyst
body: Stale-data alert test was successful for the seven-day threshold.

author: B01 Project Director
body: Decision is urgent because the next reinforcement release is due within three days.

author: Supply Chain Lead
body: Factory expeditor scope and reporting frequency have been drafted.

author: Construction Manager
body: Raft pour remains achievable if approval is closed and the batching slot is retained.

author: Systems Manager
body: Ventilation package delivery is the main threat to energization confidence.

author: PMO Director
body: Prioritize reliable portfolio data over cosmetic dashboard enhancements.
